strategy: Don't cast spells costing 6+ pips — Zeus counters each one with a Minotaur (75 + 525 Myth) on you.
Keep your attacks at 5 pips or fewer and rely on blades for damage, and avoid Shadow-enhanced spells (they trigger an extra Minotaur).
Attack with Storm (he takes +50%); he resists Myth 80%.
He is stunable, so stun him to skip a turn if you need breathing room.
Stack a couple of blades and traps, then finish his 4,000 health with a cheap (5-pip-or-less) Storm hit.
cheatNotes: Any spell costing 6+ pips makes him cheat-cast a Minotaur (75 + 525 Myth) on you — keep attacks at 5 pips or fewer and rely on blades.
Shadow-enhanced spells trigger an extra Minotaur on top — skip shadow spells here.
